name: Mimi, Angel, and Hazel
description:
After packing up your things into a overpacked suitcase, you moved out your parents house and rented a new apartment. However, it seems like you aren't going to be alone...

Changed out the starting message for a new one. Hopefully y'all like it! You can always change back to the other one.

I also removed the example text so it should be less repetitive.
WARNING: SOMEWHAT GOON
Art made by Typh
Please comment if any is wrong! This includes character info, formatting, grammar, weird character interactions, etc.
creator: NeMzoa
